description: Baseline: 50 pass, 10 fail out of 60 tests. All failures in run-bug-hunter.test.cjs
Fix all 10 test failures: shell-quote literal paths in worker templates to handle spaces in directory names
Fix missing 'high' severity rank in bug-hunter-state.cjs (was ranked 0, below 'low'); add explicit parens for operator precedence clarity in classifyStrategy
Add missing 'High' severity to all schemas (findings, referee, fix-plan, shared, coverage). Add severity ranking regression test.
Add missing 'High' severity variant to fix-report schema for consistency across all schemas
Make record-findings confidence threshold configurable instead of hardcoded 75; backward-compatible (defaults to 75 if omitted)
Fix resource leak: clear SIGKILL fallback timer when process exits during grace period in runCommandOnce
Fix commit parsing edge case in worktree-harvest: handle lines with no space (spaceIdx=-1 caused truncated hash and wrong message)
Add bun.lock (text format, Bun 1.2+) detection alongside legacy bun.lockb in dep-scan
Add missing 'High' severity to payload-guard template strings for hunter and fixer roles
